title: Field Lines, Repetition, Combination, Structured Fields, and Limits · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent protocol team receives different fragmentation, peer, trust, timing, and failure constraints and transfers field lines, repetition, combination, structured fields, and limits into a new loss-aware bounded field-section model. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of loss-aware bounded field-section model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Parse case-insensitive token field names, colon delimiters, optional field whitespace, and field values while rejecting whitespace before the colon.
Preserve field-line order and repeated values, combining only when that field definition permits it.
Parse Connection options and nominate hop-by-hop fields dynamically instead of relying only on a fixed list.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Field Name Value Grammar
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab protocol team handles case 2993 in a privacy-sensitive proxy translating between two parser implementations. Build deterministic Go evidence to preserve repeated field lines and reject sections beyond a bounded policy; preserve this operating constraint: diagnostics must omit credentials and attacker-controlled metric labels; then reject a protocol transition while optimistic bytes are buffered and prevent desynchronization. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Field Name Value Grammar.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for parse case-insensitive token field names, colon delimiters, optional field whitespace, and field values while rejecting whitespace before the colon. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Field Name Value Grammar, keep Field Name Value Grammar connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
